blended.narrative: Searchmont Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 39°F.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
